elements.text: 浙江大学2015-2016学年秋冬学期 研究《计算理论》课程期终考试试卷
考试形式：闭卷，考试时间：2016年115，所需时间:120分钟 学号： 姓名： 专业： 任课教师：金小刚
Zhejiang University Theory of Computation, Fall-Winter 2015 Final Exam

(a) ( ) Let L be any regular language. Then the number of equivalence classes respect to language L (i.e. x ≈L y, if for all z ∈ ∑*, xz ∈ L iff yz ∈ L ) is inite. (b) ( ) The language {anbnw|w ∈ {a, b}*, n ∈ N, and |ω| = 2n} is context-free. (c) ( ) The language {"M”"w"|M accepts w in less than 2016 steps } is not recursive. (d) ( ) The language {"M” | M is a TM and L(M) is Context-free but L(M) is not regular} is not recursive. (e) ( ) The language {"M1” "M2” | M1 and M2 are TMs, and M1 halts on e but M2 doesn't halt on e} is recursively enumerable, but not recursive. (f)( ) The set of all primitive recursive functions is a proper subset of the set of all-recursive functions. (g) ( ) Let A and B be two disjoint recursively enumerable languages. If AU B is also be recursively enumerable, then it is possible that neither A nor B is decidable. (h) ( ) Let H10 = {"M"|M is a TM and 10 ∈ L(M)} and τ1 and τ2 are recursive functions. If H1o ≤τ1 L and H1o ≤r2 L, then L is recursive enumerable but not recursive. (i) ( ) Suppose SAT ≤p L and L ∈ P. Then P = NP. (j) ( ) Let H = {"M” "w"| TM M halts on input string wW}, then H is NP-complet
1. (20%) Determine whether the following statements are true or false. If it is true write a  otherwise a × in the bracket before the statement.
